title: Python Foundations I
teaching_focus: What AI, ML, data science, model, feature, and label mean
Variables, data types, strings, numbers, booleans
common_mistakes: Students may memorize syntax without understanding why it works.
Students may confuse input types and fail to convert strings to numbers.
Students may jump to code before describing the problem in plain English.
assessment_tip: Evaluate explanation, correctness, and ability to modify the solution.
